achievements.title: Thankfully They Brought Unique Attires
achievements.description: Win a match in which each participant is the same character with a different color in Versus Mode (P1 Side, Normal Difficulty or higher)

achievements.title: Chojin in Training
achievements.description: Win a match as a Recruit Wrestler in Versus Mode (P1 Side, Normal Difficulty or higher)

achievements.title: Ultimate 3-Way
achievements.description: Win a 3P Battle Royal in Versus Mode (P1 Side, Normal Difficulty or higher)

achievements.description: Win a 4P Battle Royal in Versus Mode (P1 Side, Normal Difficulty or higher)

achievements.title: Chojin Creator
achievements.description: Create a Chojin in Create Mode and win a Singles match with them in Versus Mode (P1 Side, Normal difficulty or higher)

achievements.title: Ultimate Bash Slam
achievements.description: Finish a match with a Created Chojin's Level 3 Special Move (P1 Side, Normal Difficulty or higher)
